creator: bsd@volki.at

make: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/poppler-utils

This happens with many ports, and my usual workaround is to delete the corresponding lines from pkg-plist and then build and install again. But the poppler-utils manpages are quite important and I would like to install them along with the executables.
